source_videos.title: Chapter 1 part 1 | Honkai Impact 3rd Story Mode Gameplay

dialogues.text: Major, unidentified flying object sighted above Soukai City! Location: SH0639.
Optical readings cannot discern the nature of this UFO. No bio-energy readings. Scans of the UFO interiors have failed.
Clusters of small Honkai Beasts and Mech units detected. Battle plan deployed and validated.
Deploying drones to cover Valkyrie boarding action.
Himeko: Double time, Kiana!
Kiana: Aye, aye, madam! Don't rush me. It's hard work out here!
Himeko: Geez. Maintain discipline, soldier.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Himeko, I'm off!

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Be sure to evade the enemy's attacks.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Haha, piece of cake!

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Kiana, activate the burst system and get this battle over with!

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Let's review Time Fracture, Kiana.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Himeko... The aircraft was destroyed.

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: (Groan) Save the explanations for later. I'll prepare a new drone for you now.

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Soukai City is on the brink of destruction.

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: We must stop that battleship from crashing into the city and killing 30 million people.

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Ultimate evasion! Retaliate now!

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: The battle machine is already nearby, keep moving forward!

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Why are they all retreating? It seems there is a big one about to arrive.

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Kiana.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Himeko, wait! I'll take down this big bugger and then give you a full report!

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Skip that fight. You're close enough to the target battleship.

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: I will make your drone stall midair, it will be up to you to grab the battleship when the moment is right.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Don't worry; watch this!
Kiana: Himeko, I've sent the Honkai Beasts packing. The Selene is within sight!
Himeko: Roger. Prepare to land, Kiana.

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Report your status, Kiana

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: I'm on deck! Everything's going smooth, Himeko!

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: I've said it many times, but I'll say it again: You may only address me as "Major Himeko"!

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Ahem: 30 minutes before the battleship crashes.

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: We must seize the helm of this battleship. We cannot let it destroy Soukai City!

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Your teammates are in position. They will rendezvous with you in a while.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: May You're talking about Mei, right? I'll be meeting up with, Mei, right?

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Calm down, girl. Stop being so obsessed about Mei.

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Stay vigilant. We've lost track of that Emperor-class Honkai Beast you've fought.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Pfft. By the time that idiot comes around, I'll be riding this battleship home.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Haha, you've stunned the enemy. Now, finish them!

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Kiana, head towards that lit area ahead.

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Target neutralized. Keep moving towards the forward section of the deck.

dialogues.speaker: Mei
dialogues.text: Kiana, Mei reporting. I'm safely in position.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Mei!!. Awesome I'll head over right now!

dialogues.speaker: Mei
dialogues.text: Hey, wait. We should follow the battle plan...

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Were the bestest partners! We must stick together to make things easier.

dialogues.speaker: Mei
dialogues.text: I think it should be "make things easier for us".

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Oh, dear! Whatever. The battle plan also allowed us to be "flexible and respond as required", right? Just wait for me!

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Can't wait any longer! It's already been 2 hours, 27 minutes, and 38 seconds since I've last seen Mei!

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Ultimate evasion! Retaliate now!

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: No annoying zombies or beasts can get between Mei and I!
Mei: Hmm, that's about it.
Kiana: Mei! We'll get the strength of a hundred warriors if Mei's around!
Mei: A hundred? I'm no ultra woman...
Kiana: I mean that if Mei's around me, I can feel my power increase one hundred-fold!
Mei: That's really something that Kiana would say.

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: ... alright, I got it. Kiana, keep being "flexible" and I'll reconsider your battle deployment next time.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Hmm

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Still remember why I've assigned you to partner up with Mei?

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Uhm... Because we are soul mates with a special connection?

dialogues.speaker: Mei
dialogues.text: ... be serious, Kiana.

dialogues.speaker: Mei
dialogues.text: Before deployment, Major Himeko reminded us to watch out for enemy types

dialogues.speaker: Mei
dialogues.text: Different Valkyrie battlesuits can counter different enemy types.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Ah, types. Yeah, of course I know that... that thing.

dialogues.speaker: Himeko
dialogues.text: Let's pray you do. Mei, please take care of her.

dialogues.speaker: Mei
dialogues.text: Don't worry, Major Himeko.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Himeko! Stop belittling Mel Hmph!

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: Mei, why did you switch off those traps? Were not super-hackers like Bronya. This is a waste of time.

dialogues.speaker: Mei
dialogues.text: Kiana, you should know that a stitch in time saves nine.

dialogues.speaker: Kiana
dialogues.text: A snitch in nine saves time? What the hell is that?

dialogues.speaker: Mei
dialogues.text: Switching off the traps here will make things easier for us down the road.
